disturbance
N - enrolled in section 1915(C) waiver for technology dependent / medically fragile
O - enrolled in section 1915(C) waiver for unspecified or unknown populations
P - enrolled in section 1915(C) waiver this month for autism/spectrum disorder
Null/Missing – No Medicaid coverage during the month
 E_WAIVER2_1 - 12 Monthly Medicaid Waiver Status (2nd type of waiver) see E_WAIVER1_1-12
 E_WAIVER3_1 - 12 Monthly Medicaid Waiver Status (3rd type of waiver) see E_WAIVER1_1-12
